title: BC Superspin Drill
purpose: Maximum cadence development for track cycling

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/2. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 10:00 at 70%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 0:30 at 65%. Base training: the secret no one wants to do. That's why it works.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Steady state endurance. 65% FTP, 130-160 rpm. Sustainable for hours.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Easy miles = fast racing. 65% for 0:30. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 25% done. Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training. Allegedly.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Easy spin. 65% for 30s. 130-160 rpm, Seated. Relax and breathe.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 26% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 26% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 65% FTP, 130-160 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 65% for 0:30. So easy you could do this all day. (Please don't.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 26% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 27% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 27% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 27% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. 65%, 130-160 rpm. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 27% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 30s of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 65% for 30s. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 30s at 65%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 30s of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 29% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 30% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 130-160 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 30% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace. 0:30 at 65%.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 30% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 30s of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 31% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 65% FTP, 130-160 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 26 minutes to go. Your friends are posting threshold intervals. You're being smart. Or lazy. Both?
coachingNotes.MIXED: 31% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 32% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 65% for 30s. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 32% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 65% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 32% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 1:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/2. 55% FTP, Seated. 1:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 1:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 36% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 1:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/2. 55% FTP, Seated. 1:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 15 minutes of work done. 23 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 41% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 1:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 41% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 1:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 1:00. Then 21min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 1:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 1:00 at 55%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 21 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 55% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 1:00. Then 20min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 46% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 1:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2. 10:00 at 60%. Boring? Maybe. Effective? Absolutely.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 130-160 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Zone 2 is where fitness quietly accumulates. 10:00 of smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 49% done. 10 minutes left. This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science. Probably.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 49% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 29 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 29 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 74% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 74% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
